questions.question: During the salvage of the Local Area Network and Servers, which of the following steps would normally be performed first?

options.A: Recover equipment
options.B: Assess damage to LAN and servers
options.C: lnstall LAN communications network and servers
options.D: Damage mitigation

questions.explanation: The correct answer is B: Assess damage to LAN and servers. The other options are incorrect: A (Recover equipment); C (lnstall LAN communications network and servers); D (Damage mitigation).

questions.question: Which of the following rules pertaining to a Business Continuity

options.A: Critical vendors should be contacted ahead oftime to validate equipment can be obtained in a timely manner.
options.B: There should be requirements to form a committee to decide a course of action. These decisions should be made ahead of time and incorporated
options.C: In orderto facilitate recovery, a single plan should cover all
options.D: ln its procedures and tasks, the plan should refer to functions, not specific

questions.explanation: The correct answer is A: Critical vendors should be contacted ahead oftime to validate equipment can be obtained in a timely manner.. The other options are incorrect: B (There should be requirements to form a committee to decide a course of action. These decisions should be made ahead of time and incorporated); C (In orderto facilitate recovery, a single plan should cover all); D (ln its procedures and tasks, the plan should refer to functions, not specific).

questions.question: Which of the following statements pertaining to dealing with the media/news outfit after a disaster occurred and disturbed the organization's activities is incorrect?

options.A: The CEO should always be the spokesperson for the company during
options.B: The disaster recovery plan must include how the media is to be handled
options.C: The organization's spokesperson should report bad news before the press gets a hold of it through another channel.
options.D: An emergency press conference site should be planned ahead.

questions.explanation: The correct answer is A: The CEO should always be the spokesperson for the company during. The other options are incorrect: B (The disaster recovery plan must include how the media is to be handled); C (The organization's spokesperson should report bad news before the press gets a hold of it through another channel.); D (An emergency press conference site should be planned ahead.).

questions.question: Which of the following statements pertainingto a Criticality Survey is incorrect?

options.B: Management's approval should be obtained before distributing the survey.

options.D: It is implemented to gather input from all personnel that is going to be part of the

questions.explanation: The correct answer is A: The purpose of the survey must be clearly stated.. The other options are incorrect: B (Management's approval should be obtained before distributing the survey.); C (Its intent is to find out what services and systems are critical to keeping the organization in business.); D (It is implemented to gather input from all personnel that is going to be part of the).

questions.question: Once an intrusion into your organization's information system has been detected, which of the following actions should be performed first?

options.A: Eliminate all means of intruder access.
options.B: Contain the
options.C: Determine to what extent systems and data are compromised.
options.D: Communicate with relevant parties.

questions.explanation: The correct answer is C: Determine to what extent systems and data are compromised.. The other options are incorrect: A (Eliminate all means of intruder access.); B (Contain the); D (Communicate with relevant parties.).

questions.question: Which of the following is used to help business units understand the impact of a disruptive event?

options.A: A disaster recovery plan
options.B: A vulnerability assessment
options.C: A business impact assessment
options.D: A risk analysis

questions.explanation: The correct answer is C: A business impact assessment. The other options are incorrect: A (A disaster recovery plan); B (A vulnerability assessment); D (A risk analysis).

options.B: BCP committee BCP Senior business unit management

questions.question: Which of the following statements pertaining to disaster recovery planning is

options.A: A disaster recovery plan should cover return from alternate facilities to primary
options.B: Every organization must have a disaster recovery plan
options.C: The major goal of disaster recovery planning is to provide an organized way to make decisions if a disruptive event occurs.
options.D: A disaster recovery plan contains actions to be taken before, during and after a

questions.explanation: The correct answer is B: Every organization must have a disaster recovery plan. The other options are incorrect: A (A disaster recovery plan should cover return from alternate facilities to primary); C (The major goal of disaster recovery planning is to provide an organized way to make decisions if a disruptive event occurs.); D (A disaster recovery plan contains actions to be taken before, during and after a).

questions.question: Which of the following statements do not apply to a hot site?

options.A: It is accessible on a first come first serve basis. In case of large disaster it might not
options.B: It provides a false sense ofsecurity.
options.C: There are cases of common overselling of processing capabilities by the service
options.D: It is expensive.

questions.explanation: The correct answer is B: It provides a false sense ofsecurity.. The other options are incorrect: A (It is accessible on a first come first serve basis. In case of large disaster it might not); C (There are cases of common overselling of processing capabilities by the service); D (It is expensive.).

questions.question: Which of the following statements is the most important assumption behind the warm site concept?

options.A: The warm site is partially configured with selected network equipments and
options.B: The choice of a warm site is less expensive than that of a hot site.
options.C: The main equipment can be obtained quickly for emergency installation at
options.D: Heat, ventilation and air conditioning are installed at the warm site.

questions.explanation: The correct answer is C: The main equipment can be obtained quickly for emergency installation at. The other options are incorrect: A (The warm site is partially configured with selected network equipments and); B (The choice of a warm site is less expensive than that of a hot site.); D (Heat, ventilation and air conditioning are installed at the warm site.).

questions.question: What is a hot-site facility?

options.A: A site with ready made work space with telecommunications equipment, LANs, PCs, and terminals for work groups.
options.B: A site with pre-installed computers, raised flooring, air conditioning, telecommunications and networking equipment, and
options.C: A site in which space is reserved with pre-installed wiring and raised
options.D: A site with raised flooring, air conditioning, telecommunications, and networking

questions.explanation: The correct answer is B: A site with pre-installed computers, raised flooring, air conditioning, telecommunications and networking equipment, and. The other options are incorrect: A (A site with ready made work space with telecommunications equipment, LANs, PCs, and terminals for work groups.); C (A site in which space is reserved with pre-installed wiring and raised); D (A site with raised flooring, air conditioning, telecommunications, and networking).

questions.question: Of the reasons why a Disaster Recovery plan gets outdated, which of the following is not true?

options.A: Large plans can take a lot ofwork to maintain
options.B: lnfrastructure and environment changes
options.C: Continous auditing makes a Disaster Recovery plan
options.D: Personnel turnover

questions.explanation: The correct answer is C: Continous auditing makes a Disaster Recovery plan. The other options are incorrect: A (Large plans can take a lot ofwork to maintain); B (lnfrastructure and environment changes); D (Personnel turnover).

questions.question: What is electronic vaulting?

options.A: lnformation is backed up to tape on a hourly basis and is stored in a on-site vault.
options.B: lnformation is backed up to tape on a daily basis and is stored in a on-site vault.
options.C: Transferring electronicjournals or transaction logs to an off-site storage
options.D: A transfer of bulk information to a remote central backup

questions.explanation: The correct answer is D: A transfer of bulk information to a remote central backup. The other options are incorrect: A (lnformation is backed up to tape on a hourly basis and is stored in a on-site vault.); B (lnformation is backed up to tape on a daily basis and is stored in a on-site vault.); C (Transferring electronicjournals or transaction logs to an off-site storage).

questions.question: After a company is out of an emergency state, what should be moved back to the original site first?

options.A: Most critical components
options.B: Least critical components
options.C: lT support staff
options.D: Executives

questions.explanation: The correct answer is B: Least critical components. The other options are incorrect: A (Most critical components); C (lT support staff); D (Executives).

options.A: Simulation
options.B: Full
options.C: Check|ist
options.D: Parallel

questions.explanation: The correct answer is D: Parallel. The other options are incorrect: A (Simulation); B (Full); C (Check|ist).
